# BP-102 positive variant: reordered handler parameters retain the same gap.
lang: go
file: BP-102-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func serve(request *http.Request, writer http.ResponseWriter) {
	result, loadErr := load(request)
	if loadErr != nil {
		return
	}
	writer.Write(result)
}

func load(*http.Request) ([]byte, error) { return []byte("ok"), nil }
